title: Arca-Armaments
description: The custom weapon mod made for Arcamere.
body:
Adds in various weapons from accross the world for the Arcamere server. 
Has currently 4 different classes of weapons that dictate its stats: 
- Light weapons (low attack, fast speed)
- Standard weapons (medium attack, medium speed)
- Heavy weapons (high attack, slow speed) 
- Ranged weapons (range)

There are plans on adding making the weapons more unique and adding in 3d models for some.
